topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)
keyPointsSummary: Identify the time clue in a sentence to choose the correct tense
Present tenses use am/is/are or have/has; Past tenses use was/were or had; Future tenses use will
"Continuous" always has -ing; "Perfect" always has V3 (past participle)
Practice converting one sentence across all 12 tenses to build fluency

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा हूँ।
quickQuiz.answer: I have been eating rice for an hour.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से चावल खा रहा था।
quickQuiz.answer: I had been eating rice for an hour.

mustRememberRules: Identify the time clue in a sentence to choose the correct tense
Present tenses use am/is/are or have/has; Past tenses use was/were or had; Future tenses use will
"Continuous" always has -ing; "Perfect" always has V3 (past participle)
Practice converting one sentence across all 12 tenses to build fluency
